## Summary

What changed and why (one short paragraph).

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation only (README, PLAYBOOK, CONTRIBUTING)
- [ ] Prompts or methodology (`ai-dev-flow/prompts/`, flow behavior)
- [ ] Wrappers (Copilot, Cursor, Claude, Codex, Antigravity)
- [ ] CI or repository automation
- [ ] Other

## Validation

- [ ] CI passes (or explain why not, for draft PRs)
- [ ] I used the contributor checklist in `CONTRIBUTING.md` where it applies

## Notes for reviewers

Anything optional: trade-offs, follow-ups, or risk areas.
